steps.title: Substitute the condition into the function definition
steps.content:
We're given $f(x) = 30x$ and need to find $x$ such that $f(x) = 180$. Substitute this condition into the function:
$$30x = 180$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 30 to isolate $x$:
$$x = \frac{180}{30} = 6$$
